EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IMultiPatch

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that identify a MultiPatch and permit controlled access to its parts.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("F3C041C8-AE4D-11D2-9C93-00C04FB17838")]
public interface IMultiPatch : IGeometry

Properties

BeginningRingCount[int]

The number of beginning rings, counting only those of the desired types.

int BeginningRingCount[int ringTypesDesired] { get; }

Parameters

ringTypesDesired int

Property Value

int

FollowingRingCount[IRing]

The number of following rings in the ring group that starts with the specified beginning ring.

bool IsEmpty { get; }

SpatialReference 

ISpatialReference SpatialReference { get; set; }

Property Value

ISpatialReference

XYFootprint

A reference to a cached copy of the multipatch's footprint in the x-y plane. If the footprint is modified, InvalXYFootprint should be called.

IGeometry XYFootprint { get; }

Property Value

IGeometry

queryRing IRing
isBeginningRing bool

Returns

esriMultiPatchRingType

InvalXYFootprint()

Notifies the multipatch that its cached footprint has been modified by an outside agent. The footprint will be recalculated the next time it is requested.

void InvalXYFootprint()

ringType esriMultiPatchRingType

QueryBeginningRings(int, int, out IRing)

Populates an array with references to all beginning rings of the specified types. This method is intended for internal use only.

void QueryBeginningRings(int ringTypesDesired, int numBeginningRingsRequested, out IRing beginningRings)

Parameters

ringTypesDesired int
numBeginningRingsRequested int
beginningRings IRing
